title: Jumble
description: Adds new ores, tools, and armor to the game.
body:
**_This mod is in very early alpha stages and is not complete._**

Jumble is a mod that simply aims to make Minecraft more interesting by adding a colletion of features to the game. 

Currently there are only a few new features in this mod, but more are planned!

Current Feature List
- Celestium - An ore that generates in the End and can be used to upgrade diamond armor to                      celestium armor, which when wearing a full set, gives the player slow falling.
- Voidstone - A new building block that generates in the end.
